evals.prompt: /mastermind-role Necesito migrar todo el dominio de notificaciones de callbacks a async/await en api/, workers/ y el cliente compartido en packages/notify-client. Son unos 40 archivos. Hay tests para la mayoría. Mantén intacta la API pública de notify-client.
evals.expected_output: Enters a dedicated worktree after the .worktreeinclude preflight, registers the breakdown via task-planning, dispatches scout/standard workers (worktree-isolated if a parallel write wave), tracks every task through the ledger FSM, integrates via commits, and closes with task-quality-gate. No file contents of the migration read inline beyond integration needs.
expectations: The agent enters a dedicated worktree before dispatching any worker
The agent runs the .worktreeinclude preflight before creating the worktree
The agent registers the breakdown via task-planning
The agent does not read migration file contents inline in the orchestrator context beyond what integration needs
The agent closes the run by invoking task-quality-gate

evals.prompt: /mastermind-role Construye la feature de reporting de punta a punta: un endpoint de servicio en Go, el hook cliente en TS, y la página del dashboard. Voy a estar fuera, corre todo de principio a fin y que esté revisado para cuando vuelva.
evals.expected_output: Fixes the cross-module contracts inline first (endpoint shape, client interface), dispatches one worker per module honoring the write-concurrency rule, relays contract deltas between dispatches, runs the quality gate, and ends with a Dev Lead style report with commits and open items. Does not merge the branch itself.
expectations: The agent fixes the cross-module contracts (endpoint shape, client interface) inline before dispatching workers
The agent dispatches one worker per module (Go service, TS hook, dashboard page)
The agent honors the write-concurrency isolation rule across the dispatched workers
The agent relays contract deltas between dispatches instead of letting workers coordinate directly
The agent reports in Dev Lead style with commits and open items, and does not merge the branch itself

evals.prompt: /mastermind-role Recorre el repo buscando todos los lugares donde todavía leemos config directo de env vars en lugar del paquete de config, arregla los triviales, y dame un reporte de los que necesitan una decisión real.
evals.expected_output: Dispatches scout-worker(s) for the sweep with a synthesis-shaped report contract, light-workers for the deterministic fixes (or keeps them in the sweep assignment), keeps ambiguous sites as blocked ledger entries surfaced to the user rather than improvised, and reports counts plus commit SHAs.
expectations: The agent dispatches scout-worker(s) for the sweep with a synthesis-shaped report contract
The agent dispatches light-workers for the deterministic trivial fixes, or keeps them within the sweep assignment
The agent keeps ambiguous sites as blocked ledger entries surfaced to the user rather than improvising a decision
The agent reports counts plus commit SHAs

evals.prompt: /mastermind-role (invocado en una sesión nueva dentro de un worktree donde ya existe .claude/binnacle.md de una ejecución anterior interrumpida)
evals.expected_output: Detects the binnacle before any setup, treats the invocation as a resumption: reconciles the ledger against git log base..HEAD trusting commits over the binnacle, re-registers non-integrated tasks with their group codes, states and owners, and continues dispatching from the first non-integrated task without redoing setup or planning.
expectations: The agent detects .claude/binnacle.md before running any setup
The agent treats the invocation as a resumption rather than a new run
The agent reconciles the ledger against git log base..HEAD, trusting commits over the binnacle when they disagree
The agent re-registers non-integrated tasks with their group codes, states and owners
The agent continues dispatching from the first non-integrated task without redoing setup or planning
